label: Think node conditional under combat pressure
description: Satisfied when a minimum number of enemies are within a close threat distance of the pawn.

maxThreatDistance.label: Max threat distance
maxThreatDistance.description: Enemies within this distance count toward the close-threat total.

minCloseTargets.label: Min close targets
minCloseTargets.description: Minimum number of enemies within max threat distance required for the conditional to be satisfied.
